name: RecSys Frontend Feature Contract
purpose: Canonical feature and behavior spec for frontend generation and implementation

coreRequirements.title: City Selection Entry
coreRequirements.userIntent: User must start by selecting one city from a fixed showcase set.

requiredBehavior.flow: Initial screen blocks search/results until city is selected.

acceptanceCriteria: Search and recommendations are not accessible before city selection.

coreRequirements.title: Area Selection Per City
coreRequirements.userIntent: User selects a delivery area within selected city.

requiredBehavior.flow: Area options are dependent on selected city.

acceptanceCriteria: Area list changes when city changes.
User can navigate back and change city.

coreRequirements.title: Intent Search Input
coreRequirements.userIntent: User enters food intent query (for example chicken tikka or cheese pizza).
acceptanceCriteria: Search cannot be submitted without city and area.
Search submits query plus location context.

coreRequirements.title: Location-Aware Request Context
coreRequirements.userIntent: Backend receives location context for delivery-carbon-aware reranking.

requiredBehavior.reason: Location context enables delivery distance/emission effects in scoring.

acceptanceCriteria: All recommendation requests include city and area.
City/area shown in UI summary to confirm active context.

coreRequirements.title: Dual-Model Recommendation Response
coreRequirements.userIntent: Display top K results from baseline and lifecycle-aware models.
acceptanceCriteria: Both lists are visible together after search.
Each list renders up to K cards in rank order.

coreRequirements.title: Two Ranked Lists Side by Side
coreRequirements.userIntent: User compares rankings directly between models.

requiredBehavior.layout: Desktop: two columns, Mobile: stacked sections.

acceptanceCriteria: Responsive layout remains readable on mobile and desktop.
Clear visual distinction between both model sections.

coreRequirements.title: Carbon Grade Badge Per Item
coreRequirements.userIntent: Each item must expose environmental cost through a clear grade marker.

requiredBehavior.visual: Color-coded circular badge on each card.
requiredBehavior.mapping: Derived from total carbon value thresholds.

acceptanceCriteria: Every rendered card shows one grade badge.
Badge color and letter are consistent with grade mapping.

coreRequirements.title: Lambda Slider Control
coreRequirements.userIntent: User adjusts weight between commercial relevance and carbon cost.

requiredBehavior.display: Current lambda value and interpretation text are always visible.

acceptanceCriteria: Slider only snaps to allowed discrete values.
Changing slider triggers reranking request with selected lambda.

coreRequirements.title: Lifecycle-Only Rerank on Lambda Change
coreRequirements.userIntent: Only lifecycle-aware list updates when lambda changes.

requiredBehavior.apiBehavior: Send request only for lifecycle-aware mode using same query/city/area with new lambda.

acceptanceCriteria: Commercial list remains stable during lambda updates.
Lifecycle list refreshes with visual reranking state indicator.

frontendOnlyFallbackPlan.goal: Allow full UI demo even when backend is unavailable.
strategy: Use static city/area data for onboarding selectors.
For recommendation requests, try live API first, then fallback to deterministic mock responses on failure.
Allow an explicit environment switch to force mock mode for demos.
nonGoals: No ML validity guarantee in mock mode.
Mock scores are placeholders and will be replaced by backend outputs later.
